findings.title: Album.candidate field semantics drift — data-model.md says 'admin merge', code+T063+S-F1 say 'T065 auto-reconciliation'
findings.source: product-spec/data-model.md:355-359 §"Album identity normalization" step 3 — "create a 'candidate' album record flagged for admin merge"
findings.actual: data-model.md narrative case is "manual album entry → admin merge". Code uses candidate=True for the Discogs-fallback materialisation path that is automatically reconciled by T065 weekly cron. The manual-entry path does not currently exist in code (T053a future stub handles missing-album reports separately).
findings.proposed_resolution: Update data-model.md §"Album identity normalization" step 3 to: "Else if Discogs ID is present → materialise Album(candidate=True, source=DISCOGS) to be reconciled by the weekly T065 MBID-reconciliation worker." Also add Album.candidate field to the Album entity sketch lines 89-114.

findings.title: plan §3.1 + data-model.md indexes table say 'unique sparse' but code uses partialFilterExpression (post-66f0403 fix)
findings.source: plan.md:264 (`albums` indexes row); product-spec/data-model.md:402-404 (Album indexes rows)
findings.target: apps/api/src/auxd_api/modules/albums/models.py:215-237 — both Album.mbid + Album.discogs_release_id use partialFilterExpression={field: {$exists: True, $ne: None}}
findings.actual: Plan + data-model still describe pre-fix sparse-unique design. Code reflects the post-deploy partial-filter fix. Pydantic serialises None to BSON null (present, not missing) so sparse-unique still indexes null values — causing the production DuplicateKeyError on the second null insert observed in the §6 search-endpoint deploy. partialFilterExpression excludes both missing AND null, which is the actual MVP intent. The conftest drops both indexes post-init_beanie because mongomock-motor does not honor partial filters.
findings.proposed_resolution: Update plan.md:264 + product-spec/data-model.md:402-403 from "unique sparse" to "unique partial-filter ({$exists: true, $ne: null}) — sparse was insufficient because Pydantic serialises None to BSON null". Add DM-6 decision-log entry capturing the partial-filter index shape decision.
